Tests that `Math.log(-0)` returns `-Infinity`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.log` function in JavaScript when the input is negative zero. The assertion verifies that the result of `Math.log(-0)` is `-Infinity`, which is the expected mathematical outcome. This code provides narrow functionality as it focuses on a specific edge case of the logarithm function. It is likely used in a test suite to ensure that the JavaScript engine or environment correctly handles this particular case.
